reasoning: The Lean statement matches the informal one in every respect. The hypotheses `[Group G] [IsCyclic G] [Fintype G]` together encode "finite cyclic group", and `Fintype.card G > 2` encodes "more than two elements". The conclusion `∃ a b : G, a ≠ b ∧ orderOf a = Fintype.card G ∧ orderOf b = Fintype.card G` asserts the existence of two distinct elements each of order equal to |G|, which is exactly the meaning of "more than one element whose order equals |G|". The Mathlib notions `orderOf` and `Fintype.card` correspond to element order and group cardinality in the standard way. No hypotheses are silently added or dropped, and the quantifier structure matches.
